id: RULE.ARCH.SPEC Defines what AudioMason1 is and must be
statement: This specification defines what AudioMason v1 is and must be.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 1. Purpose of This Document

id: RULE.ARCH.ANY change must comply with this specification
statement: Any implementation, patch, refactor, or feature must comply with this specification.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 1. Purpose of This Document

id: RULE.ARCH.SPEC is the single source of truth
statement: This specification is the single source of truth for what the code in this repository does, must do, and must not do.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 1. Purpose of This Document

id: RULE.ARCH.If code and spec conflict the spec wins
statement: If any code contradicts this specification, the specification wins.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 1. Purpose of This Document

statement: AudioMason v1 is a deterministic, ASCII-only CLI tool for importing, normalizing, tagging, and publishing audiobooks from messy real-world sources.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 2. Identity and Scope

statement: AudioMason v1 is not a framework, not a plugin system, not a web application, and not a library.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 2. Identity and Scope

id: RULE.ARCH.same input must produce same output
statement: The same input must always produce the same output.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 3. Core Principles (Non-Negotiable) > 3.1 Deterministic Behavior

id: RULE.ARCH.if same input produces different output something is wrong
statement: If the same input ever produces a different result, something is wrong and that is taken seriously.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 3. Core Principles (Non-Negotiable) > 3.1 Deterministic Behavior

statement: All file system paths produced by AudioMason must be ASCII-safe.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 3. Core Principles (Non-Negotiable) > 3.2 ASCII-Safe Paths

statement: Non-ASCII characters are forbidden in output file paths, directory names, and tag values.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 3. Core Principles (Non-Negotiable) > 3.2 ASCII-Safe Paths

statement: AudioMason must fail fast on errors rather than silently guessing or continuing with invalid state.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 3. Core Principles (Non-Negotiable) > 3.3 Fail-Fast

statement: AudioMason must not silently guess when input is ambiguous or incomplete.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 3. Core Principles (Non-Negotiable) > 3.3 Fail-Fast

statement: The CLI is the primary interface. AudioMason must be scriptable and automatable.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 3. Core Principles (Non-Negotiable) > 3.4 CLI-First and Scriptable

id: RULE.ARCH.all content must be English ASCII-only
statement: All repository content must be written in English: source code, comments, commit messages, documentation, and specifications.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 2. Identity and Scope

statement: Argument parsing must be pure and must not require config to complete.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands

id: RULE.ARCH.config loaded only for commands that need it
statement: Configuration must be loaded only for commands that actually require it (import, publish). inspect and init must work without config.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands

id: RULE.ARCH.inspect and init must work without config
statement: The inspect and init commands must work without requiring a configuration file.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.3 Command: inspect

statement: When no subcommand is given, the default command is import.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

statement: Running audiomason without arguments must execute the import flow.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

statement: The verify command must never modify files. READ_ONLY_VERIFY must be True.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.2 Command: verify

id: RULE.ARCH.init creates config at user path
statement: The init command must create the configuration file at ~/.config/audiomason1/config.yaml.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.4 Command: init

id: RULE.ARCH.init wizard must ask filesystem roots before secrets
statement: The init wizard must ask for filesystem roots before secrets so the user can finish durable setup first and skip AI later if needed.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.4 Command: init

id: RULE.ARCH.init wizard must use getpass for secrets
statement: The init wizard must use getpass for secret input and write the resulting file with restrictive permissions like 0600.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.4 Command: init

id: RULE.ARCH.init wizard must prefill filesystem roots with safe defaults
statement: The init wizard must prefill filesystem roots with safe user-space defaults but keep them editable so the user can override every path.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.4 Command: init

statement: The cache gc command must validate that cache entries are within the cache root before deletion.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.5 Command: cache gc

id: RULE.ARCH.version output must be machine-readable kv line
statement: The --version flag must output a single machine-readable line in the format audiomason_version=X.Y.Z.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.7 Version and Support Output

statement: The version string must be read from package metadata via importlib.metadata.version, with fallback to 0+unknown.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.7 Version and Support Output

id: RULE.ARCH.support banner prints after successful import
statement: The support banner (Support AudioMason: https://buymeacoffee.com/audiomason) must print after successful import unless --no-support is set.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.7 Version and Support Output

statement: The processing phase must not prompt the user. All interactive decisions must be collected during the preflight phase.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.6 Processing Phase

statement: All user-facing decisions must be collected upfront during the preflight phase before processing begins.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions

id: RULE.ARCH.source path must be under drop root
statement: The source path for import must be under the configured drop root (inbox).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.3 Source Selection

id: RULE.ARCH.author and title must not contain path separators
statement: Author and book title values must not contain / or backslash characters.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.6 Processing Phase

id: RULE.ARCH.yes plus clean_inbox ask must die
statement: When --yes is set and clean_inbox mode is ask, the program must exit with an error.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions

statement: Successfully processed books must be added to the ignore list to prevent re-processing.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.6 Processing Phase

id: RULE.ARCH.pipeline steps must satisfy ordering constraints
statement: Pipeline steps must satisfy the defined ordering constraints: unpack<convert, convert<chapters, chapters<split, convert<rename, convert<tags, convert<cover, convert<publish, split<rename, split<tags, split<cover, split<publish.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.2 Pipeline Steps Ordering

id: RULE.ARCH.required pipeline steps must not be removed
statement: The required pipeline steps (unpack, convert, rename, tags, cover) must not be removed or disabled.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.2 Pipeline Steps Ordering

id: RULE.ARCH.output layout is fixed archive author title
statement: The output directory layout must follow the fixed pattern: archive_root/author/title.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.7 Output Layout

id: RULE.ARCH.default pipeline steps order is fixed
statement: The default pipeline steps order must be: unpack, convert, chapters, split, rename, tags, cover, publish.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.2 Pipeline Steps Ordering > 5.2.1 Default Pipeline Steps

id: RULE.ARCH.pipeline_steps must be list of strings
statement: The pipeline_steps configuration value must be a list of strings or null (for default).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.2 Pipeline Steps Ordering > 5.2.2 Pipeline Step Validation

id: RULE.ARCH.unknown pipeline steps must cause error
statement: Unknown pipeline step names must cause an AmConfigError.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.2 Pipeline Steps Ordering > 5.2.2 Pipeline Step Validation

id: RULE.ARCH.duplicate pipeline steps must cause error
statement: Duplicate pipeline step names must cause an AmConfigError.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.2 Pipeline Steps Ordering > 5.2.2 Pipeline Step Validation

id: RULE.ARCH.missing required pipeline steps must cause error
statement: Missing required pipeline steps (unpack, convert, rename, tags, cover) must cause an AmConfigError.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.2 Pipeline Steps Ordering > 5.2.2 Pipeline Step Validation

statement: The default preflight steps list must contain exactly these 12 keys in order: reuse_stage, use_manifest_answers, choose_source, choose_books, skip_processed_books, publish, wipe_id3, clean_stage, source_author, book_title, cover, overwrite_destination.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.1 Preflight Steps Registry

statement: The choose_source and choose_books preflight steps are NON-MOVABLE and must never be reordered.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.1 Preflight Steps Registry

id: RULE.ARCH.all default preflight steps must be present
statement: A validated preflight steps list must contain all 12 default steps. Missing steps must cause a ValueError.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.1 Preflight Steps Registry

id: RULE.ARCH.unknown or duplicate preflight steps must cause error
statement: Unknown or duplicate preflight step keys must cause a ValueError during validation.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.1 Preflight Steps Registry

id: RULE.ARCH.preflight ordering reuse before manifest before books
statement: Preflight ordering constraints: reuse_stage must precede use_manifest_answers, which must precede choose_books.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.2 Preflight Ordering Constraints

statement: Preflight ordering constraint: choose_source must precede choose_books.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.2 Preflight Ordering Constraints

statement: Preflight ordering constraint: choose_books must precede skip_processed_books.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.2 Preflight Ordering Constraints

id: RULE.ARCH.preflight ordering author before title before cover before dest
statement: Preflight ordering constraints: source_author must precede book_title, which must precede cover, which must precede overwrite_destination.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.2 Preflight Ordering Constraints

id: RULE.ARCH.preflight ordering books before title cover dest
statement: Preflight ordering constraints: choose_books must precede book_title, cover, and overwrite_destination.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.2 Preflight Ordering Constraints

id: RULE.ARCH.preflight_disable must be list of known keys
statement: The preflight_disable configuration value must be a list of keys from the allowed set: publish, wipe_id3, clean_stage, clean_inbox, reuse_stage, use_manifest_answers, normalize_author, normalize_book_title, cover.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.3 Preflight Disable Keys

id: RULE.ARCH.unknown preflight_disable key must cause error
statement: An unknown preflight_disable key must cause an AmConfigError.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions > 5.5.3 Preflight Disable Keys

id: RULE.ARCH.config not found must point to audiomason init
statement: When the configuration file is not found, the error must point the user to audiomason init.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System

id: RULE.ARCH.config path is home config audiomason1 config.yaml
statement: The default user config path must be ~/.config/audiomason1/config.yaml.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.1 Config File Location

id: RULE.ARCH.config resolution order is --config then user path
statement: Configuration resolution order must be: explicit --config path first, then ~/.config/audiomason1/config.yaml.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.2 Config Loading and Merging > 6.2.1 Config Resolution Order

statement: The loaded YAML config must be deep-merged with the DEFAULTS dictionary. Nested dicts are merged recursively; scalar values are overwritten.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.2 Config Loading and Merging

id: RULE.ARCH.prompts.disable must be list of strings
statement: The prompts.disable configuration key must be a list of strings.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.3 Prompt Disable Keys

id: RULE.ARCH.prompts.disable must not mix wildcard with specific keys
statement: The prompts.disable list must not combine the wildcard * with specific disable keys.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.3 Prompt Disable Keys

id: RULE.ARCH.prompts.disable must not contain unknown keys
statement: The prompts.disable list must not contain keys that are not in the allowed set.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.3 Prompt Disable Keys

statement: The prompts.disable list must not contain duplicate keys.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.3 Prompt Disable Keys

statement: The allowed prompts.disable keys are: normalize_author, normalize_book_title, publish, wipe_id3, reuse_stage, cover, choose_source, choose_books, skip_processed_books, overwrite_destination, source_author, book_title, choose_cover, cover_input.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.3 Prompt Disable Keys

statement: The openlibrary.enabled configuration value must be a boolean.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System

statement: The ai.enabled configuration value must be a boolean.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System

statement: The ai.provider configuration value must be a string.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System

statement: The ai.endpoint configuration value must be a string.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System

statement: The ai.model configuration value must be a string.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System

statement: The ai.api_key_env configuration value must be a string.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System

statement: The ai.timeout_s configuration value must be a positive number.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System

statement: The ai.max_completion_tokens configuration value must be a positive integer.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System

id: RULE.ARCH.all root paths must be absolute
statement: All root paths (inbox, stage, output, archive, cache) must resolve to absolute paths.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.1 Root Paths

id: RULE.ARCH.relative paths resolved against data base
statement: Relative paths in configuration must be resolved against the data base directory (~/.local/share/audiomason or AUDIOMASON_DATA_ROOT).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.1 Root Paths

id: RULE.ARCH.default root layout under data base
statement: Default root paths under the data base: inbox=abooksinbox, stage=_am_stage, output=abooks_ready, archive=abooks, cache=.cover_cache.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.1 Root Paths > 7.1.1 Default Root Layout

id: RULE.ARCH.AUDIOMASON_ROOT is app-root not data root
statement: AUDIOMASON_ROOT is the app-root (config discovery). AUDIOMASON_DATA_ROOT overrides the data base for paths. They are distinct.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.1 Root Paths > 7.1.1 Default Root Layout

id: RULE.ARCH.legacy constants must not be removed
statement: Legacy constants (DROP_ROOT, STAGE_ROOT, OUTPUT_ROOT, ARCHIVE_ROOT, CACHE_ROOT) must not be removed. They exist for backward compatibility.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.1 Root Paths > 7.1.2 Legacy Constants

id: RULE.ARCH.ignore files must always be outside inbox
statement: Ignore files (.abook_ignore) must always be stored outside the inbox directory.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.2 Ignore Files

id: RULE.ARCH.only zip rar 7z archives supported for import
statement: Only .zip, .rar, and .7z archive formats are supported for import.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.3 Archive Handling

statement: External archive tools (unzip, unrar, 7z) must be installed on the system for archive processing.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.3 Archive Handling

statement: The inspect command must support broader archive extensions: .zip, .rar, .7z, .tar, .gz, .tgz, .bz2, .xz.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.3 Archive Handling

id: RULE.ARCH.import audio extensions are mp3 m4a opus
statement: For import, the supported audio file extensions are: .mp3, .m4a, .opus.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.4 Audio File Extensions

id: RULE.ARCH.inspect audio extensions are broader set
statement: For inspect, the supported audio file extensions are: .mp3, .m4a, .m4b, .flac, .ogg, .wav, .aac.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.4 Audio File Extensions

statement: OpenLibrary is the primary metadata source for author and book validation.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.1 OpenLibrary Integration

statement: OpenLibrary API requests must be rate-limited with at least 0.2 seconds between requests.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.1 OpenLibrary Integration

id: RULE.ARCH.openlibrary uses diacritics stripping for suggestions
statement: OpenLibrary suggestions must strip diacritics before comparison.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.1 OpenLibrary Integration

id: RULE.ARCH.google books searches cs then sk
statement: Google Books integration must search with language restriction cs first, then sk.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.2 Google Books Integration

id: RULE.ARCH.fuzzy suggestion requires strong score and clear gap
statement: Fuzzy suggestions from OpenLibrary and Google Books must require a strong score (>=0.92) and a clear gap (>=0.03) between the top two matches.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.4 Fuzzy Matching Thresholds

statement: AI metadata lookup is a fallback only and must not be used when OpenLibrary provides a valid result.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.3 AI Fallback

id: RULE.ARCH.ai confidence threshold must be at least 0.8
statement: AI suggestions must meet a confidence threshold of at least 0.8 to be accepted.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.3 AI Fallback

statement: AI metadata suggestions must be sanitized to ASCII-only output.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.3 AI Fallback

id: RULE.ARCH.ai must persist raw API response for debugging
statement: When debugging AI lookup behavior, the raw API response must be persisted next to the current stage run so later inspection does not depend on logs or cache state.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.3 AI Fallback

statement: The default AI provider must be openai_compatible with endpoint api.openai.com and model gpt-4o-mini.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.3 AI Fallback

statement: AI lookup must retry at most 4 times (MAX_AI_ATTEMPTS=4) with exponential backoff on HTTP 429/5xx.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.3 AI Fallback

statement: OpenLibrary lookup results must be cached to disk at AUDIOMASON_ROOT/_state/openlibrary_cache.json.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.5 Metadata Cache

statement: AI lookup results must be cached to disk at AUDIOMASON_ROOT/_state/ai_lookup_cache.json.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.5 Metadata Cache

statement: The ID3 TCON (genre) frame must always be set to Audiobook.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 9. ID3 Tagging

id: RULE.ARCH.id3 TIT2 must be filename stem
statement: The ID3 TIT2 (title) frame must be set to the MP3 filename stem (name without extension).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 9. ID3 Tagging

id: RULE.ARCH.cover APIC frame must be reset before write
statement: The APIC (cover art) frame must always be reset before writing a new cover.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 10. Cover Handling

statement: AVIF images must be detected via the ftyp box containing avif or mif1 before falling back to a generic MIME type.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 10. Cover Handling

statement: Cover image cache entries must use a SHA1 hash as the filename in the cache directory.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 10. Cover Handling

id: RULE.ARCH.url covers must be cached to disk
statement: Cover images fetched from URLs must be cached to disk to avoid repeated downloads.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 10. Cover Handling

statement: FFmpeg and FFprobe must be installed for audio conversion and chapter splitting.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 11. Audio Processing

statement: Loudness normalization must use the parameters I=-16:LRA=11:TP=-1.5.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 11. Audio Processing

id: RULE.ARCH.verify expects root author book layout
statement: The verify command expects the library layout to follow root/Author/Book structure.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 12. Verify Command

id: RULE.ARCH.verify checks cover and id3 tags
statement: The verify command must check for the presence of cover.jpg and valid ID3 tags in each book directory.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 12. Verify Command

statement: The die() function must never print a traceback.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 13. Error Handling

statement: User cancellation (AmAbortError) must produce exit code 130.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 13. Error Handling

statement: General exit errors (AmExitError) must produce exit code 2.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 13. Error Handling

statement: Configuration errors (AmConfigError) must include a message pointing the user to audiomason init.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 13. Error Handling

id: RULE.ARCH.external tool errors wrapped in amexternaltoolerror
statement: CalledProcessError from external tools must be wrapped in AmExternalToolError.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 13. Error Handling

statement: In dry-run mode, no file system modifications, no API writes, and no cache writes must occur.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 14. Dry-Run Mode

statement: In dry-run mode, cache reads are permitted but cache writes are forbidden.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 14. Dry-Run Mode

statement: Manifest read/write errors must never propagate to the user; they must be treated as if the manifest is missing.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse

statement: Manifest file writes must be atomic (write to tmp file, then rename).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse

statement: The source fingerprint used for stage reuse must be deterministic (SHA256 over path, size, and mtime_ns).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse

statement: The manifest.json schema_version must be 1.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse > 15.1 Manifest Schema

statement: Every manifest.json must contain a schema_version key.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse > 15.1 Manifest Schema

id: RULE.ARCH.manifest uses deep merge on update
statement: Manifest updates must use deep merge: nested dicts are merged recursively, scalar values are overwritten.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse > 15.1 Manifest Schema

id: RULE.ARCH.file fingerprint uses SHA256 path size mtime_ns
statement: File fingerprint must be SHA256 of: resolved path string, pipe, F, pipe, size, pipe, mtime_ns.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse > 15.2 Source Fingerprinting

statement: Directory fingerprint must be SHA256 of: resolved path string, pipe, D, pipe, then for each file in sorted walk: pipe, relpath, pipe, size, pipe, mtime_ns.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse > 15.2 Source Fingerprinting

id: RULE.ARCH.dir fingerprint handles missing files deterministically
statement: When a file disappears during directory scan, the fingerprint must include |MISSING| and the relative path to remain deterministic.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse > 15.2 Source Fingerprinting

id: RULE.ARCH.cache gc must skip files outside cache root
statement: The cache gc must skip any cache entries whose resolved path falls outside the cache root directory.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 16. Cache Management

id: RULE.ARCH.cache entries must have 40-char hex SHA1 stem
statement: Valid cache entries must have a filename stem that is exactly 40 hexadecimal characters (SHA1).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 16. Cache Management

id: RULE.ARCH.out skips non-error messages in quiet mode
statement: The out() function must skip non-error messages when quiet mode is active.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.6 Global Flags

id: RULE.ARCH.prompt returns default in yes mode
statement: In --yes mode, the prompt() function must return the default value without asking the user.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.6 Global Flags

id: RULE.ARCH.for AI fallback pass source context explicitly
statement: For AI fallback prompts, source and book context must be passed explicitly and deterministic retry backoff must be used on HTTP 429 before falling back.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.3 AI Fallback

id: RULE.ARCH.for user-facing defaults prefer heuristic before AI
statement: For user-facing defaults, a cheap heuristic must be tried before AI: normalizing the prompt default is more reliable than post-prompt correction.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.3 AI Fallback

id: RULE.ARCH.for series numbering infer style from root audio first
statement: For audiobook series titles, the numbering style must be inferred from the root audio or batch suggestion first, then the rest of the series normalized to that single style.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline

id: RULE.ARCH.arabic numerals preferred for mixed numbering
statement: For mixed numbering in a series, arabic numerals must be used as the canonical style.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline

id: RULE.ARCH.for AI metadata hints read existing ID3 tags read-only
statement: For AI metadata hints, existing ID3 tags must be read-only and passed as small structured JSON samples instead of free-form prose.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 8. Metadata Lookup > 8.3 AI Fallback

id: RULE.ARCH.change fragments required for src plugins docs changes
statement: Any change to src/, plugins/, or docs/ requires a corresponding new file under docs/change_fragments/. Direct editing of docs/changes.md is forbidden.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative)

statement: The --json flag must print a machine-readable JSON report to stdout at the end of import. The report must contain keys: sources (list), books (list), decisions (list), results (dict with sources_total, books_total, books_processed).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.6 Global Flags

id: RULE.ARCH.json report is derived from manifest only
statement: The --json report must be built deterministically from manifest.json data only. No external API calls or non-deterministic sources.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.6 Global Flags

statement: When --json is active, the support banner must be suppressed (machine/silent mode).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.6 Global Flags

id: RULE.ARCH.json shows version banner by default
statement: When --json is active, the version banner must still be shown by default unless --quiet is also set.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.6 Global Flags

id: RULE.ARCH.path flag specifies source under drop root
statement: The optional positional path argument for import must specify a source path under DROP_ROOT. Relative paths are resolved against DROP_ROOT. Absolute paths are validated to be under DROP_ROOT.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

id: RULE.ARCH.path flag skips source selection prompt
statement: When a specific source path is provided via the positional argument, the source selection prompt must be skipped.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

statement: The --preflight-disable CLI flag (repeatable, comma-separated) must override the preflight_disable configuration value.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

statement: The --disable-prompt CLI flag (repeatable, comma-separated) must override the prompts.disable configuration value. It supports the wildcard '*'.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

id: RULE.ARCH.disable_prompt empty list must cause error
statement: When --disable-prompt is provided but yields no valid keys after parsing, an AmConfigError must be raised.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

statement: The --processing-log flag must save a per-source processing log (.log) to the stage directory. Default is off.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

statement: The --processing-log-path flag must save the per-source log to an explicit file or directory. If the path ends with / or is an existing directory, a per-source filename is created inside. Otherwise the path is used directly (enforced .log extension). Implies --processing-log.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

id: RULE.ARCH.processing_log is mutually exclusive with path
statement: The --processing-log and --processing-log-path flags must be mutually exclusive.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

id: RULE.ARCH.verify flag runs verify after import
statement: The --verify flag must run the verify command after a successful import.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.1 Command: import

statement: The --verify-root flag must specify the root directory for the verify command. Falls back to paths.verify_root from config, then to output_root.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.2 Command: verify

id: RULE.ARCH.verify command can run without config when root provided
statement: The verify command must run without requiring configuration when an explicit root is provided (positional root or --verify-root).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.2 Command: verify

statement: The --no-support flag must disable the support banner after successful import.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.7 Version and Support Output

id: RULE.ARCH.support banner suppressed in quiet and json modes
statement: The support banner must be suppressed in --quiet mode and --json mode (machine/silent modes).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.7 Version and Support Output

id: RULE.ARCH.support banner can be disabled via config
statement: The support banner can be disabled via config key support.enabled: false.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.7 Version and Support Output

id: RULE.ARCH.batch import two-phase when all sources picked
statement: When all sources are selected (answer 'a') and there are multiple sources, import must run in two phases: preflight (all sources, decisions only) then process (all sources, no further prompts).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline

id: RULE.ARCH.batch import single source uses combined phase
statement: When a single source is picked (either by number or when only one source exists), import must use a single combined phase.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline

statement: The source listing must filter out ignored sources before presenting them to the user. Ignored sources must never appear in the selection prompt.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.3 Source Selection

id: RULE.ARCH.source list filters hidden and internal dirs
statement: The source listing must filter out entries starting with '.', entries starting with '_', and known internal artifacts (_am_stage, import.log.jsonl, .DS_Store).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.3 Source Selection

id: RULE.ARCH.source list allows only dirs and archives
statement: The source listing must allow only directories and supported archive files (.zip, .rar, .7z). Other file types must be excluded.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.3 Source Selection

statement: Stage reuse is possible only when the stage/src directory exists and the stored fingerprint matches the current source fingerprint.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse

id: RULE.ARCH.stage reuse prompt asks reuse then manifest answers
statement: When stage reuse is possible, two sequential prompts must be asked: (1) reuse existing staged source? (2) if yes, use saved manifest answers to skip prompts?
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse

id: RULE.ARCH.stage reuse skips staging when accepted
statement: When stage reuse is accepted, the source must not be re-copied into stage. The existing stage/src directory must be reused.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse

id: RULE.ARCH.stage reuse with manifest answers restores all decisions
statement: When stage reuse with manifest answers is accepted, all previously saved decisions (publish, wipe_id3, author, title, cover_mode, overwrite, clean_stage, picked books, processed books) must be restored from manifest.json.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse

id: RULE.ARCH.stage reuse deletes old stage when declined
statement: When stage reuse is possible but declined by the user, the existing stage directory must be deleted and recreated from scratch.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 15. Manifest and Stage Reuse

statement: The Opts.yes field controls non-interactive mode. When true, prompt() returns defaults and prompt_yes_no() returns the default answer without asking.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.6 Global Flags

statement: The Opts.dry_run field must forbid all file system writes, API writes, and cache writes when true.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 14. Dry-Run Mode

id: RULE.ARCH.opts publish None means ask unless yes
statement: The Opts.publish field: None means ask user (unless --yes, then True), True means publish, False means do not publish.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions

id: RULE.ARCH.opts wipe_id3 None means ask unless yes
statement: The Opts.wipe_id3 field: None means ask user (unless --yes, then True), True means wipe, False means do not wipe.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions

id: RULE.ARCH.clean_inbox ask mode requires explicit decision with yes
statement: When --yes is set and clean_inbox mode is 'ask', the program must exit with a non-interactive error requiring an explicit --clean-inbox yes|no.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions

id: RULE.ARCH.clean_inbox decision resolved once per run
statement: The clean_inbox decision must be resolved once per run (not per source) and must never prompt mid-PROCESS phase.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline

id: RULE.ARCH.clean_inbox yes deletes source after import
statement: When clean_inbox mode is 'yes' and import succeeds, the source directory or archive under DROP_ROOT must be deleted.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline

statement: The clean_inbox mode must fall back to config key clean_inbox (default 'no') when the --clean-inbox CLI flag is not provided.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.5 Default Configuration Values

id: RULE.ARCH.ignore system has two levels source and book
statement: The ignore system must support two levels: source-level (prevents entire source from appearing in listing) and book-level (prevents individual book from being re-processed).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.2 Ignore Files

id: RULE.ARCH.source ignore file is parent of inbox
statement: The source-level ignore file (.abook_ignore) must be located at the parent directory of the inbox (DROP_ROOT.parent).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.2 Ignore Files

statement: The book-level ignore file must be named {source_name}.abook_ignore and located at the parent directory of the source.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.2 Ignore Files

id: RULE.ARCH.ignore matching uses NFKC casefold and slug
statement: Ignore matching must normalize entries using NFKC Unicode normalization, casefold, and slug transformation. Both original and slug forms must be checked.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.2 Ignore Files

id: RULE.ARCH.ignore file lines starting with hash are comments
statement: Lines in ignore files starting with '#' must be treated as comments. Lines containing only '~' or empty lines must be skipped.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.2 Ignore Files

id: RULE.ARCH.processed books added to book ignore
statement: After successful processing, each book must be added to the book-level ignore file to prevent re-processing.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.6 Processing Phase

id: RULE.ARCH.source added to ignore only when all books processed
statement: A source must be added to the source-level ignore list only when all books in that source have been processed (all labels match ignore).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.6 Processing Phase

id: RULE.ARCH.preflight orchestrator has three context levels
statement: The preflight orchestrator must support three context levels: none (no source selected), source_selected (source chosen but no books), books_selected (books chosen).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions

id: RULE.ARCH.preflight steps with min_context are deferred
statement: Preflight steps with a min_context requirement higher than the current context level must be deferred (placed in pending) and materialized when the context level advances.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions

statement: During interactive preflight, the user may enter b or back to return to the previous preflight step, including the previous book-level prompt when applicable. Back navigation must be limited to preflight and must not be available once PROCESS begins.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.5 Preflight Decisions

id: RULE.ARCH.guess heuristic uses author dash title pattern
statement: The guess_author_book heuristic must parse the 'Author - Title' pattern: split on ' - ', treat left side as author (Surname.GivenNames when >=2 words), right side as title.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline

id: RULE.ARCH.guess returns None author when pattern not matched
statement: When the 'Author - Title' pattern is not matched, guess_author_book must return (None, original_name) as the author/title pair.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline

id: RULE.ARCH.guess strips label noise from titles
statement: The guess_book_title_default function must strip trailing parenthesized and bracketed noise (e.g. '(Unabridged)') from titles using recursive regex.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline

id: RULE.ARCH.legacy prefix constants must not be removed
statement: Legacy prefix constants (TITLE_PREFIX, AUTHOR_PREFIX, BOOK_PREFIX) in paths.py must not be removed. They exist for backward compatibility and are empty strings.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.1 Root Paths > 7.1.2 Legacy Constants

statement: The COVER_NAME constant must be 'cover.jpg'.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 10. Cover Handling

statement: The GENRE constant must be 'Audiobook'.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 9. ID3 Tagging

statement: The ignore file basename constant must be '.abook_ignore'.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 7. Path and File System Rules > 7.2 Ignore Files

id: RULE.ARCH.output dir rejects path separators in author title
statement: The _output_dir function must reject author and title values containing '/' or '\' or being '.' or '..'.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.7 Output Layout

id: RULE.ARCH.next available title uses parenthesized counter
statement: When a title directory already exists and is non-empty, the next available title must use the pattern 'Title (2)', 'Title (3)', etc.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 5. Import Flow Pipeline > 5.7 Output Layout

statement: The version banner visibility must be configurable via config key version-banner (default true).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 4. CLI Commands > 4.7 Version and Support Output

id: RULE.ARCH.publish default from config is ask
statement: The default publish behavior from config must be 'ask'. Boolean config values must be converted: true->yes, false->no.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.5 Default Configuration Values

id: RULE.ARCH.clean_inbox default from config is no
statement: The default clean_inbox behavior from config must be 'no'.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.5 Default Configuration Values

id: RULE.ARCH.split_chapters default from config is true
statement: The default split_chapters behavior from config must be true.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.5 Default Configuration Values

id: RULE.ARCH.ff_loglevel default from config is warning
statement: The default ff_loglevel from config must be 'warning'. Allowed values: info, warning, error.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.5 Default Configuration Values

statement: The default ffmpeg q_a (VBR quality) from config must be '2' (high quality).
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.5 Default Configuration Values

id: RULE.ARCH.loudnorm default from config is false
statement: The default loudnorm behavior from config must be false.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.5 Default Configuration Values

id: RULE.ARCH.wipe_id3 default from config is false
statement: The default wipe_id3 behavior from config must be false.
heading_path: AudioMason v1 - Project Specification (Authoritative) > 6. Configuration System > 6.5 Default Configuration Values

triggers_rules: RULE.ARCH.SPEC Defines what AudioMason1 is and must be
RULE.ARCH.ANY change must comply with this specification
RULE.ARCH.SPEC is the single source of truth
RULE.ARCH.If code and spec conflict the spec wins
RULE.ARCH.AudioMason1 is a CLI tool
RULE.ARCH.AudioMason1 is NOT a framework
RULE.ARCH.same input must produce same output
RULE.ARCH.if same input produces different output something is wrong
RULE.ARCH.all paths must be ASCII-safe
RULE.ARCH.non-ASCII characters forbidden in paths
RULE.ARCH.fail-fast on errors
RULE.ARCH.no silent guessing
RULE.ARCH.CLI is the primary interface
RULE.ARCH.all content must be English ASCII-only
RULE.ARCH.change fragments required for src plugins docs changes
RULE.ARCH.default pipeline steps order is fixed
RULE.ARCH.default preflight steps are 12 keys
RULE.ARCH.choose_source and choose_books are NON-MOVABLE
RULE.ARCH.all default preflight steps must be present
RULE.ARCH.legacy constants must not be removed
RULE.ARCH.manifest schema version is 1
RULE.ARCH.manifest must contain schema_version
RULE.ARCH.manifest uses deep merge on update
RULE.ARCH.file fingerprint uses SHA256 path size mtime_ns
RULE.ARCH.dir fingerprint uses sorted walk
RULE.ARCH.dir fingerprint handles missing files deterministically
RULE.ARCH.opts yes controls non-interactive mode
RULE.ARCH.opts dry_run forbids all writes
RULE.ARCH.opts publish None means ask unless yes
RULE.ARCH.opts wipe_id3 None means ask unless yes
RULE.ARCH.batch import two-phase when all sources picked
RULE.ARCH.batch import single source uses combined phase
RULE.ARCH.stage reuse requires matching fingerprint
RULE.ARCH.stage reuse prompt asks reuse then manifest answers
RULE.ARCH.stage reuse skips staging when accepted
RULE.ARCH.stage reuse with manifest answers restores all decisions
RULE.ARCH.stage reuse deletes old stage when declined
RULE.ARCH.preflight orchestrator has three context levels
RULE.ARCH.preflight steps with min_context are deferred
RULE.ARCH.guess heuristic uses author dash title pattern
RULE.ARCH.guess returns None author when pattern not matched
RULE.ARCH.guess strips label noise from titles
RULE.ARCH.legacy prefix constants must not be removed
RULE.ARCH.cover_name constant is cover.jpg
RULE.ARCH.genre constant is Audiobook
RULE.ARCH.for series numbering infer style from root audio first
RULE.ARCH.arabic numerals preferred for mixed numbering
RULE.ARCH.argument parsing must be pure
RULE.ARCH.config loaded only for commands that need it
RULE.ARCH.inspect and init must work without config
RULE.ARCH.default command is import
RULE.ARCH.import is the default subcommand
RULE.ARCH.verify must be read-only
RULE.ARCH.processing phase must not prompt
RULE.ARCH.all decisions upfront in preflight
RULE.ARCH.yes plus clean_inbox ask must die
RULE.ARCH.out skips non-error messages in quiet mode
RULE.ARCH.prompt returns default in yes mode
RULE.ARCH.openlibrary is primary metadata source
RULE.ARCH.ai is fallback only
RULE.ARCH.ai confidence threshold must be at least 0.8
RULE.ARCH.ai suggestions must be ASCII-only
RULE.ARCH.ai must persist raw API response for debugging
RULE.ARCH.for AI fallback pass source context explicitly
RULE.ARCH.for user-facing defaults prefer heuristic before AI
RULE.ARCH.for series numbering infer style from root audio first
RULE.ARCH.arabic numerals preferred for mixed numbering
RULE.ARCH.for AI metadata hints read existing ID3 tags read-only
RULE.ARCH.verify expects root author book layout
RULE.ARCH.verify checks cover and id3 tags
RULE.ARCH.version output must be machine-readable kv line
RULE.ARCH.version reads from package metadata
RULE.ARCH.support banner prints after successful import
RULE.ARCH.inspect supports broader archive extensions
RULE.ARCH.openlibrary uses diacritics stripping for suggestions
RULE.ARCH.google books searches cs then sk
RULE.ARCH.ai max retry attempts is 4
RULE.ARCH.json flag outputs machine-readable report
RULE.ARCH.json report is derived from manifest only
RULE.ARCH.json suppresses support banner
RULE.ARCH.json shows version banner by default
RULE.ARCH.path flag specifies source under drop root
RULE.ARCH.path flag skips source selection prompt
RULE.ARCH.processing_log saves per-source log
RULE.ARCH.processing_log_path specifies explicit file
RULE.ARCH.processing_log is mutually exclusive with path
RULE.ARCH.verify flag runs verify after import
RULE.ARCH.verify_root flag specifies verify root
RULE.ARCH.verify command can run without config when root provided
RULE.ARCH.no_support flag disables support banner
RULE.ARCH.support banner suppressed in quiet and json modes
RULE.ARCH.clean_inbox ask mode requires explicit decision with yes
RULE.ARCH.clean_inbox decision resolved once per run
RULE.ARCH.clean_inbox yes deletes source after import
RULE.ARCH.guess heuristic uses author dash title pattern
RULE.ARCH.guess returns None author when pattern not matched
RULE.ARCH.guess strips label noise from titles
RULE.ARCH.config not found must point to audiomason init
RULE.ARCH.config path is home config audiomason1 config.yaml
RULE.ARCH.config resolution order is --config then user path
RULE.ARCH.config is deep-merged with DEFAULTS
RULE.ARCH.prompts.disable must be list of strings
RULE.ARCH.prompts.disable must not mix wildcard with specific keys
RULE.ARCH.prompts.disable must not contain unknown keys
RULE.ARCH.prompts.disable must not contain duplicates
RULE.ARCH.prompts.disable allowed keys are 14 values
RULE.ARCH.openlibrary.enabled must be boolean
RULE.ARCH.ai.enabled must be boolean
RULE.ARCH.ai.provider must be string
RULE.ARCH.ai.endpoint must be string
RULE.ARCH.ai.model must be string
RULE.ARCH.ai.api_key_env must be string
RULE.ARCH.ai.timeout_s must be positive
RULE.ARCH.ai.max_completion_tokens must be positive integer
RULE.ARCH.init creates config at user path
RULE.ARCH.init wizard must ask filesystem roots before secrets
RULE.ARCH.init wizard must use getpass for secrets
RULE.ARCH.init wizard must prefill filesystem roots with safe defaults
RULE.ARCH.pipeline_steps must be list of strings
RULE.ARCH.unknown pipeline steps must cause error
RULE.ARCH.duplicate pipeline steps must cause error
RULE.ARCH.missing required pipeline steps must cause error
RULE.ARCH.preflight_disable must be list of known keys
RULE.ARCH.unknown preflight_disable key must cause error
RULE.ARCH.preflight_disable CLI flag overrides config
RULE.ARCH.disable_prompt CLI flag overrides config
RULE.ARCH.disable_prompt empty list must cause error
RULE.ARCH.support banner can be disabled via config
RULE.ARCH.clean_inbox config fallback from config.yaml
RULE.ARCH.version banner configurable via config
RULE.ARCH.publish default from config is ask
RULE.ARCH.clean_inbox default from config is no
RULE.ARCH.split_chapters default from config is true
RULE.ARCH.ff_loglevel default from config is warning
RULE.ARCH.q_a default from config is 2
RULE.ARCH.loudnorm default from config is false
RULE.ARCH.wipe_id3 default from config is false
RULE.ARCH.all root paths must be absolute
RULE.ARCH.relative paths resolved against data base
RULE.ARCH.default root layout under data base
RULE.ARCH.AUDIOMASON_ROOT is app-root not data root
RULE.ARCH.ignore files must always be outside inbox
RULE.ARCH.only zip rar 7z archives supported for import
RULE.ARCH.archive tools must be installed
RULE.ARCH.source path must be under drop root
RULE.ARCH.processed books added to ignore
RULE.ARCH.output layout is fixed archive author title
RULE.ARCH.cover cache uses SHA1 hash
RULE.ARCH.url covers must be cached to disk
RULE.ARCH.manifest writes must be atomic
RULE.ARCH.source fingerprint must be deterministic
RULE.ARCH.cache gc must skip files outside cache root
RULE.ARCH.cache entries must have 40-char hex SHA1 stem
RULE.ARCH.openlibrary has disk cache
RULE.ARCH.ai has disk cache
RULE.ARCH.source list filters ignored sources
RULE.ARCH.source list filters hidden and internal dirs
RULE.ARCH.source list allows only dirs and archives
RULE.ARCH.ignore system has two levels source and book
RULE.ARCH.source ignore file is parent of inbox
RULE.ARCH.book ignore file is source_name.abook_ignore
RULE.ARCH.ignore matching uses NFKC casefold and slug
RULE.ARCH.ignore file lines starting with hash are comments

RULE.ARCH.source added to ignore only when all books processed

RULE.ARCH.next available title uses parenthesized counter

RULE.ARCH.cover_name constant is cover.jpg

RULE.ARCH.amexiterror exit code is 2

RULE.ARCH.external tool errors wrapped in amexternaltoolerror
